title: nepeta glomerulosa var. stapfiana
intro: Nepeta glomerulosa var. stapfiana, also known as Nepeta stapfiana, is a perennial plant species within the Nepeta genus, belonging to the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as the mint or deadnettle family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health issues, including fever, respiratory problems, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits associated with Nepeta glomerulosa var. stapfiana include relief from colds, bronchitis, and sore throats, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and reduce stress. Nepeta glomerulosa var. stapfiana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
